reviews.comment:
Son de lo peor pueden hacerte 30 minutos para cargarte nafta ya que ellos se meten todos en la oficina que tienen allí a buludear con el teléfono y son tan descarados que te ven y ni bola te dan

(Translated by Google)
They're the worst. They can make you wait 30 minutes to fill up your tank because they all go into their office there messing around on their phones, and they're so shameless that they see you and don't even acknowledge you.
